validated_commands.test: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -q --ignore=tests/unit/test_audit_report.py
validated_commands.test_full: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -q
validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.install_dev: pip install uv --break-system-packages && python3 -m uv sync --extra dev
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'python3 -m uv'. Do NOT use --cov: PyYAML global state corruption. Rich outputs ANSI codes even with NO_COLOR=1; strip with regex. Pre-existing failures: test_audit_report.py (SyntaxError f-string py3.12 backslash), test_deps_update_command.py (Group.cli AttributeError) - ~21 failures total, not caused by our changes.

coverage_baseline.notes: 6708 passing (pre-existing) + 21 new tests from uninstall-engine PR. Pre-existing failures are test_audit_report.py and test_deps_update_command.py.

monthly_activity_issue_note: Created new issue '[Test Improver] Monthly Activity 2026-04' in run 2026-04-30. Number unknown (created via safeoutputs).
ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]' to strip before text assertions. Fixed in test_policy_status.py (PR #1029).

testing_backlog.notes: Large complex file ~2804 lines. Core install logic. High risk. Deferred.

completed_work.description: Task4: verified PR #1029 CI passing. Task3: 21 new tests for uninstall/engine.py helpers. Task7: Created monthly activity issue for 2026-04.
Fixed 7 pre-existing test failures in test_policy_status.py. Added _strip_ansi() helper. 6675 tests pass.
Task1: commands validated. Task2: backlog identified.
